rulings.Case Title: JOSE CERON ET AL VS. SALLY LIU ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 31, 2019 line 1. CROSS DEFENDANT JOSE CERON, MONICA MEDINA, WENDY ENRIQUEZ, DERIK ENDERSON, JUDY JUDKINS, BRIAN RANGEL MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND is GRANTED. While there was no legal reason precluding the Cross-Defendants from responding to the Third Amended Cross-Complaint, the pending motion for Leave to File a Fourth Amended Cross-Complaint created sufficient confusion to establish facts for surprise, mistake and excusable neglect re: default taken within 24 hours of Motion for Leave to amend being taken off calendar. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: JOSE CERON ET AL VS. SALLY LIU ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion Seeking Monetary Sanctions Against Deft Sally Liu And Her Attorney For Record And Finding Of Bad Faith By Deft And Her Counsel
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 31, 2019 line 1. PLAINTIFF JOSE CERON, MONICA MEDINA, WENDY ENRIQUEZ, DERIK ENDERSON, JUDY JUDKINS Notice Of Motion Seeking Monetary Sanctions Against Deft Sally Liu And Her Attorney For Record And Finding Of Bad Faith By Deft And Her Counsel is DENIED. No evidence of compliance with the safe harbor provision on file. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: MOAB INVESTMENT GROUP, LLC VS. COURTHOUSE VENTURES, INC. ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR LEAVE TO AMEND COMPLAINT IN INTERVENTION
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 31, 2019 line 2. INTERVENOR ESTHER EAMES LLC MOTION FOR LEAVE TO AMEND COMPLAINT IN INTERVENTION is GRANTED. No opposition filed. First Amended Complaint in Intervention to be filed and served forthwith. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: STEPHEN CAMPBELL ET AL VS. PACIFIC ARMS GOUGH STREET LLC ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Plaintiffs Request For Documents, Set One From Defendant Pacific Arms Gough Street Llc;; Request For Sanctions Against Defendant And Defendants Attorney Of Record, Gregory De La Pena, In The Amount Of $1,167
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 31, 2019 line 3. PLAINTIFF STEPHEN CAMPBELL, MAXWELL MCINTIRE Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Plaintiffs Request For Documents, Set One From Defendant Pacific Arms Gough Street Llc;; Request For Sanctions Against Defendant And Defendants Attorney Of Record, Gregory De La Pena, In The Amount Of $1,167 is continued to November 14, 2019 per stipulation. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: WYATT HAHN LIN ET AL VS. LAMAX NGUYEN ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION Of Issues Ccp 437cf
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 31, 2019 line PLAINTIFF WYATT LIN, 1944 OCEAN COOPERATIVE, INC. MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION Of Issues Ccp 437cf is OFF CALENDAR. Proof of Service on file does not indicate valid personal service (i.e. papers were personally served on a courier. No Proof of Service by the Courier on the defendants filed prior to the hearing as required by CRC 3.1300) and does not provide sufficient notice based on e-service (i.e. additional 2 court days). =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: 2255 MARKET, LLC VS. JAMILA AISHA ABNER ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Plaintiff 2255 Market Street, Llc'S Notice Of Motion To Compel Defendant For Further Responses To Plaintiff'S Form Interrogatories, Set One And Two, Special Interrogatories, To Produce Documents, To Provide A Code-Complaint Privilege Log, And For An Award Of Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 31, 2019 line PLAINTIFF 2255 MARKET, LLC Plaintiff 2255 Market Street, Llc'S Notice Of Motion To Compel Defendant For Further Responses To Plaintiff'S Form Interrogatories, Set One And Two, Special Interrogatories, To Produce Documents, To Provide A Code-Complaint Privilege Log, And For An Award Of Monetary Sanctions is GRANTED, subject to opposition. Complete verified responses shall be provided no later than November 1, 2019 without objections, other than attorney-client/work product. If such objections are asserted a Privilege Log shall be produced by November 1, 2019. Sanctions granted in the amount of $1,650 to be paid within 5 days of notice of entry of order. =(501/CFH)
